title: Best car phone mounts | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best car phone mounts. Compare options and find one that fits.

recommendations.product_name: iOttie Easy One Touch (Easy One Touch 6 / iTap Magnetic 2 variants)
cons: Suction can need reapplication on textured dashboards
Magnetic variants may need metal plate or MagSafe case

recommendations.product_name: Peak Design Mobile Car Mount (VHB / Vent / Qi2 charging variants)
pros: Very strong magnet/attachment (with compatible case or adapter)
Multiple mounting options including VHB adhesive and vent
cons: Requires Peak Design case or universal adapter for full compatibility

recommendations.product_name: Lisen Auto Vacuum / Lisen Magnetic MagSafe-style Dash Mount
pros: Strong MagSafe-style hold with vacuum suction base
Affordable compared with flagship magnetic chargers
cons: Vacuum bases can lose adhesion on very textured surfaces
Magnetic compatibility varies with some phone cases
